description_long: This is a classic-style motorcycle with a predominantly red body and black accents, featuring a robust frame and a large, round headlight at the front. The motorcycle is equipped with two wide, black leather seats, and a pair of hard black saddlebags mounted on either side of the rear wheel. The handlebars are wide and fitted with rearview mirrors, while the front and rear fenders are painted red and show signs of wear and weathering. The engine and exhaust system are exposed, with visible metallic and rubber components, and the wheels are thick with deep treads suitable for urban roads. The rear of the motorcycle displays a license plate and taillight, and the overall design suggests durability and functionality for city commuting or cruising.
description: A red and black classic motorcycle with wide handlebars, leather seats, hard saddlebags, and visible engine components, showing signs of urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large round headlight, wide handlebars with mirrors, and the front fender.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the red fuel tank, black seat, hard saddlebag, and exposed engine details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the taillight, license plate, dual saddlebags, and the back of the seat.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the exhaust system, right saddlebag, and the overall length of the motorcycle.
